notes:
🚀 v35.6 - Real OBD Data & UI Polish (v53)

✅ OBD: Restored generic SAE J1979 support (RPM, Speed, Temps, Torques).
✅ OBD: Switched to auto-protocol (ATSP0) for better ECU compatibility.
✅ OBD: Supported-PID bitmap checker added (0100/20/40/60).
✅ OBD: Decoupled ATRV (battery voltage) polling to run independently.
✅ RENOGY: Removed non-existent temp sensors 3/4; temp 2 is now conditional.
✅ JUNCTEK: Charging status fix for 'remaining time' display.
✅ SSE: Fixed ESP temperature mapping.
